commitMessage:
Apply Half-Split ratio to corner actions and snap areas (#1776)

* Half size updates

* Use half Ratio sizes in Corner Calculations

* Add lock horizontal/vertical axis feature. Fix cyclic hotkeys hitting repeating the same state. Fix moving window flash after resize.

* Prefer user-centric label over implementation.

* Allow 1/2 size to be deselected from cyclic commands

* Rename Half to Side. Affects  Shortcuts, Snap Areas, and General. Added migrations

* Use legacy half names internally. Add aliases to create hooks for new side name to work for future progrmatic invocations.

* Allow alias (leftSide for leftHalf, etc) to be used in the url api

* Remove conflicting constraints for split % text input fields

* A little more spacing for cycle sizes settings

---------

Co-authored-by: Daniel <daniel@trainoperator.co>
Co-authored-by: Ryan Hanson <ryan@ryanhanson.dev>

body.content:
var rect = visibleFrameOfScreen
        rect.size.width = floor(visibleFrameOfScreen.width / 2.0)
        rect.size.height = floor(visibleFrameOfScreen.height / 2.0)
        rect.origin.y = visibleFrameOfScreen.maxY - rect.height
        return RectResult(rect, subAction: .topLeftQuarter)
